CVE-2025-64754.description: Jitsi Meet is an open source video conferencing application. A vulnerability present in versions prior to 2.0.10532 allows attackers to hijack the OAuth authentication window for Microsoft accounts. This is fixed in version 2.0.10532. No known workarounds are available.
